_comment: Canonical Tier-0 keyword taxonomy. SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH. Consumed by BOTH anvil_serving/router/classify.py (the router) and plugins/openclaw-anvil-intent-router/classify.mjs (the OpenClaw plugin), which keeps a byte-identical bundled copy because the standalone-distributed plugin cannot read the Python package at runtime. Keys are ROUTER work-classes in PRIORITY ORDER (review > planning > multi-file-refactor > bounded-edit); each maps to its ordered keyword phrase list, matched with word-boundary regex. The plugin re-maps these work-classes onto its preset enum (multi-file-refactor -> review pool; bounded-edit -> quick-edit). Edit HERE, then re-copy this file verbatim into the plugin directory; tests/router/test_keyword_parity.py fails if the two copies drift. Keys beginning with '_' are metadata and ignored by both classifiers.
